install: . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm install 24 && nvm alias default 24 && NODE24="$(nvm which 24)" && sudo ln -sf "$NODE24" /usr/local/cargo/bin/node && sudo ln -sf "$(dirname "$NODE24")/npm" /usr/local/cargo/bin/npm && sudo ln -sf "$(dirname "$NODE24")/npx" /usr/local/cargo/bin/npx && node --version && npm ci
